metadata.description: Professional Rust development plugin: specialist agents with LSP integration, team orchestration, and peer-to-peer communication

plugins.name: rust-agents
plugins.description: Comprehensive collection of specialized Rust development agents with Claude Code best practices. 13 specialist agents covering the full development lifecycle. rust-live-tester for live binary execution and anomaly detection; rust-researcher for dependency monitoring and competitive parity. continuous-improvement orchestrates both as a cycle. rust-modern-apis for proactive Rust 1.89–1.94 API suggestions. team-develop and team-debug for multi-agent orchestration. Full-cycle SDD with BRD/SRS/NFR pipeline. rust-analyzer LSP integration. Adversarial critic for stress-testing designs. Rust Edition 2024.
